problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
